title: JJ_Default_Edit
description: A vanilla themed texture pack to improve overall pvp experience
body:
# JJ_Default Edit 

### [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

JJ_Default Edit is a 16x texture pack that reimagines the default Minecraft look with cleaner, sharper visuals—without losing the soul of the original.Providing more detail and polish while staying faithful to the vanilla art style.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/FM6kBa9F7fQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0a605cc57f0d82436d9684c1f5a5d6b924c8990.gif)
Perfect for PvP, survival, or casual play, JJ_Default Edit boosts immersion and style without going overboard. Whether you’re building, exploring, or fighting, this pack keeps Minecraft looking familiar—but better.
